_description: Documentation manifest for PatientPunk universal base fields. This file is NOT loaded at runtime — it is a reference for researchers building extension schemas.

age.description: Patient's current age in years (numeric string)
age.notes: Restricted to 16-99 to reduce noise from non-demographic age mentions

sex_gender.description: Patient's biological sex or gender identity

healthcare_system.description: Healthcare system type (NHS, Medicare, private insurance, etc.)

onset_trigger.description: What triggered or preceded illness onset (infection, vaccine, surgery, etc.)

diagnosis_source.description: Who or what provided the diagnosis (specialist, self-diagnosed, etc.)

time_to_diagnosis.description: How long it took to receive a diagnosis

symptom_trajectory.description: Whether symptoms are improving, worsening, or stable

treatment_outcome.description: Response to treatments (helped, didn't help, worsened, etc.)

procedures.description: Medical procedures undergone (tilt table test, colonoscopy, etc.)

activity_level.description: Functional capacity / activity limitation (bedbound, housebound, etc.)

mental_health.description: Mental health conditions or experiences mentioned

doctor_dismissal.description: Experiences of being dismissed or disbelieved by medical professionals

diagnostic_odyssey.description: Long journey to diagnosis; many doctors seen; years undiagnosed

prior_infections.description: Prior infections that may be relevant to current illness (EBV, COVID, Lyme, etc.)

hormonal_events.description: Hormonal events related to illness onset or trajectory (pregnancy, menopause, etc.)

base_optional_fields._description: These fields exist in PATTERNS but are NOT extracted by default. Activate them in an extension schema via 'include_base_fields'.

dietary_interventions.description: Dietary changes tried (gluten-free, low histamine, carnivore, etc.)

genetic_testing.description: Genetic testing mentions (23andMe, MTHFR, HLA typing, etc.)

social_impact.description: Social impacts of illness (relationships, isolation, etc.)

toxic_exposures.description: Environmental toxic exposures (chemicals, pesticides, mold, etc.)

healthcare_costs.description: Out-of-pocket costs, insurance denials, financial burden
